# Vajra Aviation Private Limited
> Premier aviation training institute in Bangalore, India. Founded 2014 by Ex-Indian Air Force officers. ISO 9001:2015 certified. India's only EASA-approved partner with Aviotrace Swiss.

## About
- [About Vajra Aviation](https://vajraaviation.com/about): Founded by Ex-IAF officers with 20+ years of aviation experience. ISO 9001:2015 certified institute offering DGCA-approved courses since 2014.

## Courses
- [CPL Ground School](https://vajraaviation.com/course-cpl): DGCA-approved Commercial Pilot Licence ground school in Bangalore. Covers all 7 DGCA subjects.
- [ATPL Ground School](https://vajraaviation.com/course-atpl): Airline Transport Pilot Licence theory training for experienced pilots.
- [EASA Part 66 (B1 & B2)](https://vajraaviation.com/course-easa-part-66): Only institute in India with Aviotrace Swiss EASA-approved partnership. B1.1 (mechanical) and B2 (avionics) licences.
- [EASA Part 66 Exam Coaching Bangalore](https://vajraaviation.com/easa-exam-coaching-bangalore): Module-wise EASA B1 & B2 exam coaching in Bangalore. MCQ practice, mock tests, Ex-IAF instructors. Aviotrace Swiss partner.
- [EASA Coaching for South India](https://vajraaviation.com/easa-coaching-south-india): EASA Part 66 coaching for students from Tamil Nadu, Coimbatore, Chennai & South India. Weekend batches available.

- [DGCA AME Ground Classes](https://vajraaviation.com/course-dgca-ame): Aircraft Maintenance Engineer ground training approved by DGCA India.
- [Cabin Crew Training](https://vajraaviation.com/course-cabin-crew): Professional cabin crew certification course with grooming, safety, and service training.
- [Flight Dispatcher Course](https://vajraaviation.com/course-flight-dispatcher): DGCA-approved flight operations officer (FOO) training.
- [Radio Telephony (RT)](https://vajraaviation.com/course-radio-telephony): DGCA RT licence preparation course.
- [Ground Staff Training](https://vajraaviation.com/course-ground-staff): Airport ground handling and passenger services training.
- [Airline Ticketing (GDS)](https://vajraaviation.com/course-airline-ticketing): Amadeus/Galileo GDS ticketing and reservation training.

## Facilities & Faculty
- [Faculty](https://vajraaviation.com/facility-faculty): Instructors include Ex-IAF Wing Commander and senior DGCA-licensed professionals.
- [Classroom](https://vajraaviation.com/facility-classroom): Modern air-conditioned classrooms with aviation simulators in Bangalore.

## Blog / Knowledge Base
- [How to Become a Commercial Pilot in India](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-how-to-become-commercial-pilot-india): Step-by-step CPL guide — eligibility, subjects, hours, exams.
- [EASA Part 66 B1 vs B2](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-easa-part-66-b1-vs-b2): Comparison of mechanical vs avionics maintenance licences.
- [DGCA AME vs EASA Part 66](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-dgca-ame-vs-easa-part-66): Which aircraft maintenance licence is right for you?
- [DGCA Ground School Exams Guide](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-dgca-ground-school-exams): Complete preparation guide for DGCA pilot examinations.
- [Cabin Crew Training in India](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-cabin-crew-training-india): How to become cabin crew — eligibility, training, airlines.
- [CPL Ground School Complete Guide](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-cpl-ground-school-guide): Everything about CPL ground school in Bangalore.
- [DGCA AME Training Guide](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-dgca-ame-training-guide): Aircraft Maintenance Engineer career guide in India.
- [Flight Dispatcher Career Guide](https://vajraaviation.com/blog-flight-dispatcher-career): How to become a flight dispatcher in India — salary, scope.

## Contact & Location
- [Contact](https://vajraaviation.com/contact): NO.95, Third Floor, G R Arcade, Sector-C, Amrutha Nagar, Bangalore, Karnataka 560092. Phone: +91-7708100444. Email: info@vajraaviation.com.
- [FAQ](https://vajraaviation.com/faq): Common questions about admissions, eligibility, fees, and courses.
- [Placements](https://vajraaviation.com/placements): Placement assistance and alumni success stories.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2014
- Location: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- Certification: ISO 9001:2015
- Regulatory approval: DGCA India
- International partnership: Aviotrace Swiss (EASA-approved, Switzerland)
- Faculty: Ex-Indian Air Force officers
- Courses: CPL, ATPL, EASA Part 66 B1/B2, DGCA AME, Cabin Crew, Flight Dispatcher, RT, Ground Staff, Airline Ticketing
- Contact: +91-7708100444 | info@vajraaviation.com
